title: Restore Gemini to manually coordinated plans
description: Restore Gemini to planning state while documenting that the operator may need to manually prompt Gemini and Antigravity for now.
acceptance_criteria: Gemini is present in durable availability state as manually coordinated
Current command-center routing guidance allows Gemini examples without assuming reliable hcom communication
Task planning records distinguish core agents from manually coordinated agents
A durable decision records that the operator may need to prompt Gemini and Antigravity manually
